text.title: trade-off-decision-methods Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for trade-off-decision-methods as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Accepting LLM-generated criteria weights without human validation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLM weights reflect generic priors, not your team size, budget, regulatory context, or strategic priorities. A weight of 4 for "scalability" may be right for Netflix and wrong for a 10-user internal tool.

failure-mode.description: For ATAM scenarios, accepting qualitative response measures ("system is fast").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents skip the response measure or make it qualitative. Always demand a number with unit. Without it the scenario cannot drive architectural analysis.
